ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country of the user (linked to countries table) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user ( hashed for security ) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country (e.g., US, GB, JP) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for login */,
  "login_status" TEXT /* Status of the login (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the login event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of logins by the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  "average_login_time" TEXT /* Average time taken by the user to log in */,
  "total_session_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of all sessions for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user activity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
